title: Mendfinity
description: A Minecraft mod which makes the Infinity and Mending enchantments no longer incompatible with each other.
body:
# Mendfinity
Mendfinity makes it so that a bow can be enchanted with Infinity and Mending simultaneously, meaning you no longer have to choose between carrying a ton of arrows or having to make a new bow every few days.

I made this mod because, although there were a significant number of mods that already did this, there were none that worked on the current version at the time of my testing. I intend to keep this up-to-date as it is extremely simple to maintain (only about 5 lines of code in total).
